title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior and the State of Quintana Roo, which aims to grant a subsidy for the AVGM/QROO/AC02/SSC/076 Project, which allows compliance with the application of resources allocatedto the actions of assistance for the declarations of Alert of Gender Violence against Women in States and Municipalities for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARY OF GOVERNMENT
description: Coordination and Accession Agreement entered into by the Ministry of the Interior and the State of Tlaxcala, which aims to grant a subsidy for the AVGM/TLAX/AC04/PGJ/123 Project, which allows compliance with the application of resources for thes coadjuvant actions for the declarations of Gender Violence Alert against Women in States and Municipalities for fiscal year 2024.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER MINISTRY OF FINANCE AND PUBLIC CREDIT

title: EXECUTIVE BRANCH SECRETARIAT OF AGRICULTURE AND RURAL DEVELOPMENT

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARIAT OF THE PUBLIC FUNCTION
description: Circular by which it is communicated to the dependencies and entities of the Federal Public Administration, productive companies of the State, Attorney General's Office of the Republic, as well as to the federal entities, which must refrain from accepting proposals or celebratingrare contracts with the legal entity Comercit, S.A. de C.V.

title: EXECUTIVE POWER SECRETARIAT OF THE PUBLIC FUNCTION
description: Circular communicating to the dependencies, Attorney General's Office and entities of the Federal Public Administration, as well as to the federal entities, that they must refrain from accepting proposals or entering into contracts with the person in arrearsl Surman Poniente, Sociedad Anónima de Capital Variable.
